detail: cargo test -p session-api — 90 lib tests passed. Init/resume idempotency covered by context_schema_init_is_idempotent_without_forcing_a_new_run and context_pin_unpin_is_idempotent_and_persistent; load-or-create preserves pins and lineage. Re-recorded after an earlier prune_execution_runs side-effect removed this run; runtime lineage updates now also acquire the mutation lock.
